texto: Don't just bring people to church
autor: bring them to Christ. Churches are filled with church goers but not Christ followers.
explicacao: Citação de bring them to Christ. Churches are filled with church goers but not Christ followers. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Don't just bring people to church” articula reflexao, ramon-m-torres, bring em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
